name: Mobility Plus Transportation
registry_source: California Secretary of State (bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov) - not directly accessible
notes: No confident FMCSA match for the Concord, CA operator at 1990 Olivera Rd. The closest SAFER name match (USDOT 2676772, MOBILITY PLUS TRANSPORTATION LLC) is a separate intrastate NEMT carrier with physical address 6053 E Century Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90045 (79 power units, 57 drivers, active, intrastate non-hazmat, no safety rating), which does NOT match the Concord HQ. A separate, larger 'Mobility Plus Transportation' based in South San Francisco was acquired by Tectrans in April 2007 - also a different entity. The Concord business (phone 925-687-8248) is described in third-party listings as a small operator (5-9 employees, <$500K revenue), 'in operation for 8 years', and may operate without an interstate USDOT or under a different legal name. California SOS bizfile search not directly accessible via web fetch; manual lookup required.

name: Art Of Care
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us)
notes: Art of Care, Inc. (NPI 1255380051) is primarily a Medicare-certified home health care agency located at 121 Harvard Ave, 2nd Floor, Allston, MA 02134 (not 167 Corey Rd, Brighton as in the input - though Brighton/Allston are adjacent Boston neighborhoods). Founded by Piotr Wysota; Medicare certification began 12/12/2006. No FMCSA/SAFER record found under 'Art of Care' or 'Art of Care Transportation' - SAFER keyword search returned no matches. The company describes itself as home health care (not primarily a transportation carrier), so likely no USDOT registration. Listed in some directories as offering transportation services but appears to be ancillary to home health.

name: Capeway Transportation Svc Inc
officers: Jake A. Cosme (founder, pre-2017); acquired by Active MA, Inc. (subsidiary of Active Day, Trevose, PA) on 9/1/2017
entity_status: likely inactive/merged (acquired by Active Day 9/1/2017, now operates as 'Active Day of New Bedford - Capeway')
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth + Coastal M&A transaction announcement
notes: Capeway Adult Day Health Inc. and Capeway Transportation Services, Inc. were founded by Jake A. Cosme in 1996 and acquired by Active MA, Inc. (Active Day, Audax Private Equity portfolio company) on September 1, 2017. The acquisition included 81 Welby Rd real estate, 13,000 sq ft facility with 122-client capacity. Capeway Transportation provided in-program transport for adult day clients. No direct SAFER snapshot found under 'CAPEWAY TRANSPORTATION' - SAFER keyword search returned no matches; other 'Capeway' SAFER records (Capeway Towing & Transport USDOT 333114 in Hyannis, Capeway Equipment Systems USDOT 448202, Capeway Towing USDOT 606213) are unrelated towing/equipment companies. Likely operated under MA state DPU intrastate authority rather than USDOT, or possibly merged into Active Day's carrier authority post-acquisition.

name: CJ Medical Trnsprtn Co Inc
officers: Laura Cotton (President/CEO); Kevin Cotton (Vice President / co-owner)
entity_status: active (BBB accredited 11/27/2024; operating per company website)
registry_source: North Carolina Secretary of State (sosnc.gov) + BBB profile
notes: CJ Medical Transportation, Inc. (DBA CJ Medical Transportation Co., Inc.) was incorporated 1/23/2007 in NC, located at 2311 W Cone Blvd Ste 150, Greensboro, NC 27408. Self-described as 'the region's largest medical specialty transport provider' with a 50-vehicle fleet serving Greensboro, Burlington, High Point and the NC Triad. SAFER keyword search returned no matches under 'CJ MEDICAL' or 'CJ MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION' - the company likely operates intrastate-only and may not be subject to USDOT registration (NC NEMT often operates under state DHHS/Medicaid authority rather than FMCSA). Phone (336) 656-9888.

name: BMT Management LLC
inc_date: approximately 2003 (per company self-description: 'distributing medical products and equipment in reproductive medicine since 2003')
officers: Eduardo Kelly (principal, residence matches business address); Daniela Kelly (related, LinkedIn associated)
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth + LinkedIn/Manta/D&B
notes: LIKELY NOT A TRANSPORTATION OPERATOR - BMT Management LLC in Hingham, MA is a medical devices distributor focused on fertility lab equipment (operates as Steptoe Medical Devices, website steptoemd.com and fivlab.com). Company self-description: 'Distribution medical devices for fertility labs'; founded ~2003. Address: 10 Keith Way Ste 3, Hingham, MA 02043 (slight variant of input address 2 Keith Way #2). Eduardo Kelly is the principal. The siccode.com listing showing NAICS 485119 (Other Urban Transit Systems) / SIC 4111 appears to be a stale/legacy/misclassified record - the actual business is medical device distribution, NOT student transportation or school bus operations. No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'BMT MANAGEMENT'. The unrelated SAFER records for BMT TRANSPORT INC (USDOT 2806839, Paso Robles CA, 8 power units, dry bulk freight) and JAMES BRUCE STEPTOE / Steptoe Trucking (USDOT 3366133, Shelbyville TX) are not connected to this entity. Recommend removing from Summit School Services tuck-in target list - this is not a transportation company.
